productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Funky Eyewear Brown Sunglasses
description: High on style, this pair of sunglasses from united colors of benetton comes in a styled frame. An eclectic mixture of fashion and substance, its shape provides the perfect Fit over the root of your nose. The glasses come with a sturdy case. Tinted lens for use in normal daylight conditions Thin metal frame in an aerodynamic design Oval lens for absolute style and protection from elements Flexible hinges for durability Flexible nose pads made of rubber with a double nose bridge to hold the glasses in place Care Remove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth provided Remove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleaner Do not use your fingers on such stains Do not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car
